title: 第五幕　お気に召すまま

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has come to meet Fuji Kiseki's mother.
We're waiting for her at a cafe she picked for us
to go to.
choice_data_list: (I wonder what kind of person she is...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mind begins to drift, but I'm abruptly startled
from my thoughts by something odd.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why is the waiter singing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if in response, the people around us all stand
and start singing as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Musicians playing brass instruments join the show,
then dancers, and finally...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"All the world's a stage, and all must play a role in
it."

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
And mine... is your mother! Ah, long time no see,
my daughter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A beautiful Umamusume who looks just like an
adult version of Fuji Kiseki appears before us.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Long time no see, Mother! Sorry, Trainer. I forgot
to tell you, but my mother has a bad habit of
surprising people.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Calling the kettle black now, are you, dear? So,
you're Fuji's trainer. Nice to meet you, and thank
you for looking after her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect my first meeting with Fuji Kiseki's
mother to be so theatrical, yet here we are!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I see. So, essentially, you want to know how to
get over stage fright?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was hoping you could tell me since I've
never seen you get scared on stage before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Why, that's... That's just... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Oh, my dear, I do get scared on stage, though!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Sorry for laughing so hard. Why, right before
the flash mob performance started, I was
unbelievably nervous.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to put on a perfect show since it's my
first time meeting your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But I was equally terrified I would fail. It would've
been a terrible first impression if I did.
choice_data_list: I couldn't tell you were nervous at all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's because you're an audience member. I can't
possibly show you any signs of weakness!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you're always scared when you
perform, just like me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Of course, love.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: S-Seriously?! I had no idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's mother smiles faintly at her shocked
exclamation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Theater is a living art! There are times when
things go well, there are times when they don't. I
am no stranger to criticism and despair.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I invoke positive and negative feelings in my
audiences in equal parts.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So long as you are an entertainer upon a stage,
that is simply how things are.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I merely did my very best not to show that side of
myself to you. I had to save face before you as your
mother, you see.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But now that I understand your woes, there is
somewhere I'd like to bring you. Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes us in front of a train station, where a
billboard for the autumn Tenno Sho with a large
photo of Fuji Kiseki herself stands above the
bustling crowds.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I've been keeping tabs on how you've been doing.
I know of the challenge you've taken on, as well
as your acclaim in the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So, when you contacted me, I suddenly realized
what was wrong. You must feel like you're at the
end of your rope, yes?

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You must be worried about if you can meet
everyone's expectations—if you're even worthy of
such high hopes. I know how you feel. I've been
there.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Of course you already knew. I should've just
asked you from the start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki cranes her neck to look up at the
billboard version of herself smiling a fierce and
daring grin.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Mother? What should I do if I fail? What should I
do about all the people I'll end up disappointing?

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Nothing. There's nothing you can do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
An entertainer can do no more than perform. How
the audience decides to accept your performance
is up to them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Once an actor descends from the stage, there is
nothing they can say to their audience.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
For example, even if I hounded you two earlier
and kept asking you if you enjoyed my show...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't have changed how you really felt
about my performance, right? It's just like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I... I suppose that's true...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki seems reluctant to accept the advice,
and her mother smiles at her fondly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Whether we succeed or fail, all we can do is our
best to move forward, dear.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That is what you must accept in your heart in
order rise before a crowd.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I have to... accept that I can only do my best...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm not privy to the minute details of your worries,
but I have a feeling what you lack now is
determination.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Your dread of disappointing others stems from a
desire to protect yourself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Right now, you fear losing your self-worth more
than you are determined to become a good
entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You'll never be able to become an entertainer
that properly delights her audience with that
attitude.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Look. So many people are taking pictures of your
billboard and smiling as they look at it and talk
about you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Now think—what is it that you ought to do now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After parting with her mother, Fuji Kiseki goes
into a rare state of despondency.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm glad you're here with me. Truly, the best advice is also the hardest to swallow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But thanks to her, I've realized something!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I was still an actor, I only ever worried
about what she thought of me and what others
thought when they compared me to her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, she poured her heart and soul
single-mindedly into her art. There was no way I
could win against her like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A small sigh escapes from her lips.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I started my senior year, I haven't been
able to focus on my races like before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've just been becoming increasingly worried
about how to fix things if I mess up...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And the more I thought about that, the more
stressed I became. If only I'd been able to
concentrate, I wouldn't have gotten to this state.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With the way I am now, there's no way I can
become the greatest entertainer...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I want to win over everyone who's watching me,
then I can't worry about getting hurt.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
One can't become the world's greatest
entertainer without being prepared to fail trying!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the harsh truth she must still be grappling
with, Fuji Kiseki looks like a huge weight has been
lifted off her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I finally understand! I'm still terrified of
the remaining stages I have ahead...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But I get the feeling that, so long as I can
overcome this, I can take another step forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is a slight tightness in Fuji Kiseki's
confident smile, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I'll be able to do it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something I've always known from the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Behold, a star befitting of your grace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Behold, a star befitting of your grace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's that Fuji Kiseki is just like the evening
star, more fascinating and alluring that any other
twinkle in the night sky.
choice_data_list:
For you are a star brighter than anything in the
world.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm a star, huh? I guess you're right.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You really do know me too well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her blue eyes begin to sparkle with a mischievous
light, just like they did that day long ago.
